conversation.text: hey James, saw you're at the dealership. handled quite a few auto enquiries lately actually. what's your average lead volume looking like per week?
About 150. But my concern is quality. AI usually just books anyone in, I don't want my sales team wasting time with tyre kickers.

totally get that. actually the opposite is what we aim for. the agent qualifies them first based on your criteria|||if they don't have the budget or they're just browsing, it flags that. your team only sees the ones actually ready to talk

it can collect all the basic details, reg, mileage, condition, and push it straight to your CRM so your team has everything before they even call|||Louis can walk you through the integration side on a quick 20 min call if you like?
